# AYMEN.DEV — DevOps & Cloud Infrastructure Engineer

## About
I am Aymen ben Yedder, a DevOps Engineer and Web Systems Architect based in Medenine, Tunisia. Over the past 8 years I have designed and operated production infrastructure for food delivery platforms, safety management systems, and on-demand service applications.

## Core Stack
- Infrastructure: Docker, NGINX, Apache, GitHub Actions, ArgoCD, FluxCD, Prometheus, Grafana, ELK
- Development: React, Node.js, JavaScript/TypeScript, HTML5, CSS3
- Databases: MongoDB, PostgreSQL, MySQL
- Automation: Bash, PowerShell
- Project Management: Agile, Scrum, Kanban, ClickUp

## Services
- **WordPress Development**: https://aymen.benyedder.top/services/wordpress-development/
- **MERN Stack Development**: https://aymen.benyedder.top/services/mern-development/
- **Server Setup & CI/CD**: https://aymen.benyedder.top/services/
